headline: Here's Why AOC Deletes Her Tweet After Musk Tells Her 'Stop Hitting On Me'

headline: Avatar, Batman, Hunger Games And Tom Cruise: What Movie Lovers And Investors Should Know About CinemaCon 2022
summary: Dubbed the “most important gathering of movie theater owners from around the world,” the annual CinemaCon event is a chance for movie companies to show off trailers and footage from their upcoming blockbusters.
